category_sources: source_facts.description identifies a Rust port of Shadowsocks; official GitHub repository describes a Rust Shadowsocks implementation.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is shadowsocks-rust; current_curation.display-name is shadowsocks-rust.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents usage and configuration; source_facts.homepage is the official Shadowsocks site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/shadowsocks/shadowsocks-rust, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists sslocal, ssserver, ssmanager, ssservice, and ssurl; source_facts.description identifies a Rust Shadowsocks port.
